message:
refactor(cli,config): consolidate path resolution to use selectedConfigDir/DefaultPath

Eliminate duplicated XDG_CONFIG_HOME / os.UserHomeDir / os.TempDir
path resolution logic from three locations:

- cleanup.go: lastCleanupFile() now delegates to selectedConfigDir()
  instead of manually resolving home dir with tempdir fallback
- session_profile.go: sessionProfileDir() now delegates to
  selectedConfigDir() instead of duplicating the XDG/home/tempdir
  cascade
- proficiency.go: proficiencyConfigPath() now uses
  filepath.Dir(DefaultPath()) to derive the config directory,
  inheriting NTM_CONFIG awareness from the state package

This ensures all auxiliary files (.last-cleanup, profiles/,
proficiency.json) land next to the selected config file when
NTM_CONFIG is set, rather than scattering across the default
XDG directory.

New tests verify the path unification:
- TestLastCleanupFileUsesGlobalConfigFlag: confirms cleanup marker
  follows --config flag, not XDG
- TestSaveSessionProfile_UsesSelectedConfigPath: confirms profiles
  directory follows --config flag, not XDG
- TestLoadProficiency_UsesSelectedConfigPath: confirms proficiency
  file follows NTM_CONFIG, not XDG

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
